rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Executor'S Petition Due To Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Motion granted with prejudice to filing in the Probate Department. Second Amended Petition for Order Setting Aside Loan Transaction cannot be brought under Probate C Sec 850. Probate Court lacks subject matter jurisdiction and lacks personal jurisdiction over Respondents.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Sanctions; P& A; Declaration Of R.A. Canatella; Proof Mail Service.

Verified Second Amended Petn. For Order Setting Aside Loan Transaction & Canceling & Declaring Void Promissory Note & Deed Of Trust Secured By Prop. Of The Estate Without Court Permission, Caused By Lender'S Fraudulent Inducement Of Executor'S Direct Self-Dealing With Prop. Prop. Purportedly For Executor'S Own Benefit
PETITION TO TERMINATE CONSERVATORSHIP OF PERSON AND ESTATE
